calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Amy Shearer, asst. District Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-553-9706 appearing
for the Petitioner;
Atty. John Chow of Chan Chow & Dai, tel. No. 1-415-398-8308 appearing for
the Respondent.

RULING - The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Final Judgment - Petitioner's motion for final judgment is GRANTED. Petitioner followed the proper notice procedures for a petition for forfeiture. (See Health & Safety Code 11488.4(a), (c), (e).) Interested parties Lian Cong Yu and Hui Qin Zhang failed to file any claim opposing forfeiture as required by Health & Safety Code 11488.5(a) (despite being served with the petition 20 months ago) or any opposition to the motion. Health and Safety Code 11488.5(b)(1) directs mandatory default when there is no timely claim opposing forfeiture.
Even were interested parties' declarations taken as an opposition to the motion (which they are not), they fail to rebut the People's prima facie case for forfeiture. Probable cause is the showing for a prima facie case when respondent fails to file a claim opposing forfeiture. (See People v. $47,050 (1993) 17 Cal.App.4th 1319, 1325, n.6.) Probable cause is established by Sergeant Smith's declaration recounting the vehicle search and arrest of Yu on October 29, 2016, including the hidden large sum of cash, the packaging for and large amount of marijuana and the two canisters of cocaine. Yu fails to provide sufficient specific evidence to rebut the presumption based on probable cause of a nexus between the funds and narcotics transactions. (See id. at 1323-25.) Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/ru

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Continued To Sep-20-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Amy Shearer, Asst. District Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-553-9706 appearing
for the Petitioner;
Atty. John Chow of Chan Chow & Dai, Tel. No. 1-415-398-8308 appearing for the
Respondent.



RULING - The matter was discussed. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for final judgment as to Interested Party Lian Cong Yu and Pei Yu, mother of Lian Cong Yu is continued to September 20, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Opposition to be filed by August 23, 2018. Reply to be filed by September 13, 2018. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
